basic_details.short_information: Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) has released the official Young Professional-II Notification 2026 at its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IARI Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a qualification of Master’s degree in Biochemistry, Food Sciences, Life Sciences, or related subjects with a 3-year Bachelor’s degree and 2-year Master’s degree can apply through Walk-in mode on 17 August 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 35 years (3 years relaxation for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST/Women)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST/Women

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in biochemistry/ food sciences/ life sciences subjects with a 3-year Bachelor's degree and a 2-year Master's degree without NET qualification.
qualification.details: Master's degree in biochemistry/ food sciences/ life sciences subjects with a 3-year Bachelor's degree and a 2-year Master's degree without NET qualification.

content_sections.heading: IARI Young Professional-II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IARI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IARI Young Professional-II Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IARI Young Professional-II Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree in biochemistry/ food sciences/ life sciences subjects with a 3-year Bachelor's degree and a 2-year Master's degree without NET qualification.

content_sections.heading: IARI Young Professional-II Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: IARI Young Professional-II Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST/Women

content_sections.heading: IARI Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for IARI Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IARI Young Professional-II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the IARI recruitment is Young Professional-II. This is a temporary contractual position for research purposes.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced?
faq.answer: A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Young Professional-II post at the Indian Agricultural Research Institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in biochemistry, food sciences, or life sciences subjects, along with a 3-year Bachelor's degree and a 2-year Master's degree without NET qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for OBC (3 years) and SC/ST/Women (5 years).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates can apply by attending a Walk-in Interview. No online or offline application submission is required beforehand.

faq.question: Q7. What is the date and time for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held on 17th August 2026, starting at 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The interview will be conducted at the Division of Biochemistry, ICAR-IARI, Pusa Campus, New Delhi - 110012.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates bring to the interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring their bio-data, self-attested copies of educational certificates (10th, 12th, UG, PG), mark sheets, and a No Objection Certificate (NOC) if currently employed.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
